hero: Macro photography, close-up of a dental technician's hands in nitrile gloves using a fine sable brush to glaze a translucent zirconia crown held in steel tweezers. Pristine premium dental laboratory, warm amber side-light, soft cream-toned background with the soft bokeh of a CAD milling machine. Color palette: warm cream, espresso brown, polished bronze accents. Shallow depth of field, photorealistic, editorial product photography, Hasselblad look, 8k. No text, no logos, no faces.
trust: Luxury still-life product photography: five layered zirconia crowns arranged in a row on a dark espresso ceramic tray, dramatic warm studio lighting raking across them to reveal natural translucency and tooth morphology. Deep brown background with subtle bronze rim light, single shaft of warm light. Color palette: espresso, bronze, ivory. Ultra-sharp macro detail, high-end jewelry advertising style, photorealistic, 8k. No text, no logos, no hands.
service: Editorial photography: hands of a dentist opening an elegant espresso-brown delivery box on a clean clinic desk, revealing a single zirconia crown nested in cream-colored protective foam, a folded lab card tucked into the lid. Bright modern dental clinic softly blurred in the background, warm natural window light. Color palette: warm cream, espresso, bronze. Conveys premium delivery and personal care, photorealistic, shallow depth of field, 8k. No text, no logos, no faces.
